reference: Hello Doctor, my period was due on the 22nd of this month. The last period was on the 22nd of last month. Usually, I have a twenty-eight to thirty-day cycle. I was on antibiotics for a cold and cough infection. I had unprotected intercourse on the 24th of this month and took an emergency contraceptive pill within four hours. I have yet to get my period. Do you think there is anything to worry about? Please advise.
text: Hello, doctor. My period was due on the 22nd of this month. The last period was on the 22nd of last month. Usually, I have a 28 to 30 day cycle. I was on antibiotics for a cold and cough infection. I had unprotected intercourse on the 24th of this month, and took an emergency contraceptive pill within four hours. I have yet to get my period. Do you think there is anything to worry about? Please advise.
